text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A pile of letters arrive for Curren Chan. They
appear to all be fan letters.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow! These are all for me? I'm so happy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Big Bro. Is it okay if I read my letters here?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Big Sis. Is it okay if I read my letters here?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I think there might be a few too many to bring
back to my room.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I imagine three boxes full of fan letters would
indeed take up a bit of space in her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. ♪ Then I'll take my time and read them
one by one. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are so many letters. Reading them all is
going to take some time. I should get her a drink.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I boil water and make her some tea. When I try to
give it to her...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: All of the fan letters are here in this room, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: All of the fan letters are here in this room, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Okay. I guess that's the last one, then.
choice_data_list: You already read all of them?!
You already read all of them?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yeah. They're letters from my fans, after all.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If I were my fan, I'd want my letter read as soon as
possible.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I should make an Umastagram post saying
that I've read them all. Hm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Curren Chan replies to her fans with great
speed and detail.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I'm starting to understand why her fans
love her so much.
